entries.title: config bundle is invalid
entries.description: A submitted configuration bundle could not be validated.

entries.title: audit write failed
entries.description: An audit record could not be written.

entries.title: credential is missing
entries.description: No authentication credential was provided.

entries.title: multiple authentication credentials were provided
entries.description: More than one authentication credential was provided.

entries.title: purpose is required
entries.description: The request omits a required purpose.

entries.title: required scope is missing
entries.description: The caller's scopes do not include the required scope.

entries.title: batch request is too large
entries.description: The batch request exceeds the configured item limit.

entries.title: requested disclosure is not allowed
entries.description: The requested disclosure level is not permitted for the claim.

entries.title: format is unsupported
entries.description: The requested response format is not supported.

entries.title: claim was not found
entries.description: The requested claim id is not configured.

entries.title: claim operation is unsupported
entries.description: The requested operation is not supported for the claim.

entries.title: claim rule evaluation failed
entries.description: A configured claim rule could not be evaluated.

entries.title: claim version was not found
entries.description: The requested claim version does not exist.

entries.title: config apply is unavailable
entries.description: Runtime configuration apply is not available for this deployment.

entries.title: config candidate is invalid
entries.description: A submitted runtime configuration candidate failed validation.

entries.title: credential status is disabled
entries.description: The credential status surface is turned off for this deployment.

entries.title: credential status is invalid
entries.description: The requested credential status value is not valid.

entries.title: credential status transition is invalid
entries.description: The requested status transition is not permitted.

entries.title: credential status was not found
entries.description: The requested credential status record does not exist.

entries.title: credential status is unavailable
entries.description: Credential status could not be checked at this time.

entries.title: holder proof has already been used
entries.description: The supplied holder proof was already consumed.

entries.title: holder proof is required
entries.description: Credential issuance requires a holder proof that was not supplied.

entries.title: credential issuance failed
entries.description: The credential could not be issued for an internal reason.

entries.title: credential issuer is not configured
entries.description: Credential issuance was requested but no issuer is configured.

entries.title: evaluation binding mismatch
entries.description: The referenced evaluation does not match the requested binding.

entries.title: evaluation was not found
entries.description: The referenced evaluation id does not exist.

entries.title: evidence is not available
entries.description: Evidence could not be produced; also the collapsed public code for several matching-evidence conditions.

entries.title: evidence server is disabled
entries.description: The evidence surface is turned off in configuration.

entries.title: federation is disabled
entries.description: The federation surface is turned off in configuration.

entries.title: federation request is forbidden
entries.description: A known federation peer was denied by local policy.

entries.title: federation request is invalid
entries.description: A federation JSON or JWT request failed validation.

entries.title: federation token is invalid
entries.description: A federation request is missing valid authentication or its token failed verification.

entries.title: federation payload is too large
entries.description: The federation request body exceeds the configured limit.

entries.title: federation request was replayed
entries.description: A federation `jti` or nonce was already used.

entries.title: federation server error
entries.description: The federation request could not be served for an internal reason.

entries.title: federation source observation is stale
entries.description: The federation source observation is older than policy allows; returned in a signed response body.

entries.title: federation media type is unsupported
entries.description: The federation request used a content type the surface does not accept.

entries.title: idempotency key was reused with a different request
entries.description: The idempotency key was reused with a different request body.

entries.title: posture filter failed
entries.description: A posture report filter could not be evaluated.

entries.title: evidence request profile is unsupported
entries.description: The requested evidence profile is not supported.

entries.title: purpose is not allowed
entries.description: The requested purpose is not permitted for the claim.

entries.title: service is not ready
entries.description: The service is not ready to serve traffic.

entries.title: registry admin capability is not supported
entries.description: The requested registry administration capability is not supported.

entries.title: registry admin inline config apply was rejected
entries.description: An inline configuration apply was rejected.

entries.title: registry admin posture tier is invalid
entries.description: The requested posture tier is not a recognized value.

entries.title: relationship attributes are insufficient for matching
entries.description: The supplied attributes cannot resolve a relationship match.

entries.title: relationship match is ambiguous
entries.description: The relationship lookup matched more than one relationship.

entries.title: relationship was not established
entries.description: The required relationship between requester and target was not found.

entries.title: relationship policy rejected the request
entries.description: The relationship policy denied the request.

entries.title: relationship is not allowed for the requested purpose
entries.description: The relationship cannot be used for the requested purpose.

entries.title: request conflicts with current state
entries.description: OpenAPI contract umbrella example for 409 responses; not emitted verbatim at runtime. Runtime responses use specific codes such as `idempotency.conflict` or `target.match_ambiguous`.

entries.title: evidence request is invalid
entries.description: The request body or parameters failed validation.

entries.title: request is too large
entries.description: OpenAPI contract umbrella example for 413 responses; not emitted verbatim at runtime. Runtime responses use specific codes such as `batch.too_large` or `federation.payload_too_large`.

entries.title: request uri is too long
entries.description: The request URI exceeds the configured limit.

entries.title: requester attributes are insufficient for matching
entries.description: The supplied requester attributes cannot resolve a match.

entries.title: requester identifier is missing
entries.description: The request omits a required requester identifier.

entries.title: requester lookup returned more than one record
entries.description: The requester lookup matched more than one record.

entries.title: requester matching policy rejected the request
entries.description: The requester matching policy denied the request.

entries.title: requester record was not found
entries.description: The requester lookup matched no record.

entries.title: requester must reauthenticate
entries.description: The requester needs to authenticate again before the request can proceed.

entries.title: self-attestation request is denied
entries.description: A self-attestation request was denied; also the public code for invalid-token and assurance-denied conditions. The audit record carries the specific reason.

entries.title: self-attestation request is rate limited
entries.description: Too many self-attestation requests in the configured window.

entries.title: source is unavailable
entries.description: A configured source service could not be reached or did not respond.

entries.title: target attributes are insufficient for matching
entries.description: The supplied target attributes cannot resolve a match.

entries.title: target identifier is missing
entries.description: The request omits a required target identifier.

entries.title: target lookup returned more than one record
entries.description: The target lookup matched more than one source record.

entries.title: target match confidence is too low
entries.description: The best target match scored below the configured threshold.

entries.title: target matching policy rejected the request
entries.description: The target matching policy denied the request.

entries.title: target record was not found
entries.description: The target lookup matched no source record.

entries.title: target is not in a valid state
entries.description: The matched target is not in a state that allows evaluation.

entries.title: Payload Too Large
entries.description: The request body exceeds the configured limit. Published as a problem `type` only: the platform HTTP-security layer does not attach a `code` member to this response.

entries.title: reload failed
entries.description: One or more resources failed to reload.

entries.title: unknown admin resource
entries.description: The reload target id was not found.

entries.title: disclosure violation
entries.description: A disclosure-control invariant was violated before response.

entries.title: aggregate execution failed
entries.description: The query engine returned an execution error.

entries.title: filter required
entries.description: A required aggregate filter was not supplied.

entries.title: aggregate format unsupported
entries.description: The requested aggregate response format is not supported.

entries.title: aggregate measure unsupported
entries.description: A configured measure references a function that is not implemented.

entries.title: admin scope required
entries.description: The endpoint requires the admin scope.

entries.title: algorithm not allowed
entries.description: The bearer token `alg` is not in the configured allowlist.

entries.title: audience mismatch
entries.description: The bearer token `aud` does not intersect the configured audience set.

entries.title: client not allowed
entries.description: The bearer token client is not in the configured `allowed_clients` list.

entries.title: invalid credential
entries.description: The credential did not match any configured key.

entries.title: issuer mismatch
entries.description: The bearer token `iss` does not equal the configured issuer.

entries.title: jwks unavailable
entries.description: The JWKS endpoint is unreachable and no cached keys are available.

entries.title: kid unknown
entries.description: The bearer token `kid` is not in the JWKS document after one refresh.

entries.title: malformed credential
entries.description: The credential header could not be parsed.

entries.title: missing credential
entries.description: No credential in the `Authorization` or `x-api-key` header.

entries.title: purpose denied
entries.description: The `Data-Purpose` header is not permitted by policy for the resource.

entries.title: purpose header required
entries.description: The `Data-Purpose` header is required for the resource.

entries.title: scope denied
entries.description: The caller lacks the required scope.

entries.title: token expired
entries.description: The bearer token `exp` is in the past beyond the configured leeway.

entries.title: token not yet valid
entries.description: The bearer token `nbf` is in the future beyond the configured leeway.

entries.title: token signature invalid
entries.description: The bearer token signature did not verify against the resolved key.

entries.title: duplicate identifier in config
entries.description: Two configured ids collide.

entries.title: missing secret
entries.description: A required hash environment variable is unset.

entries.title: config parse error
entries.description: The configuration document did not deserialize.

entries.title: config validation error
entries.description: The configuration failed cross-field validation.

entries.title: filter required
entries.description: A row-collection read on an entity with `required_filters` received no qualifying filter.

entries.title: invalid range
entries.description: The range bounds are inverted or invalid.

entries.title: invalid filter value
entries.description: The value does not parse for the field's type.

entries.title: limit out of range
entries.description: The limit exceeds the configured maximum or is non-positive.

entries.title: filter not allowed
entries.description: The field is not in the resource's `allowed_filters` list.

entries.title: too many filters
entries.description: The request carries more filter parameters than the per-request cap allows.

entries.title: too many filter values
entries.description: An in-list exceeds the configured maximum of 100 values.

entries.title: unknown field
entries.description: A query parameter references a field not in the resource schema.

entries.title: unsupported operator
entries.description: The operator is not allowed for the field.

entries.title: cache write failed
entries.description: The parquet cache could not be written.

entries.title: table registration failed
entries.description: Table registration in the query engine failed.

entries.title: schema mismatch
entries.description: The declared schema does not match observed columns or types.

entries.title: source not found
entries.description: A configured source is missing or unreadable.

entries.title: source unreadable
entries.description: A source could not be read or parsed.

entries.title: strict schema rejected extra column
entries.description: A source contains columns absent from a strict schema.

entries.title: payload too large
entries.description: The request body or response cardinality exceeds configured caps.

entries.title: request timed out
entries.description: The request exceeded the configured timeout.

entries.title: unhandled internal error
entries.description: The request could not be served for an unexpected reason.

entries.title: uri too long
entries.description: The request URI exceeds the configured length cap.

entries.title: metadata manifest digest invalid
entries.description: The manifest digest is not valid.

entries.title: metadata manifest digest mismatch
entries.description: The manifest digest did not match the configured digest.

entries.title: metadata manifest digest required
entries.description: Governed configuration requires a manifest digest.

entries.title: metadata manifest file not found
entries.description: The metadata manifest could not be read.

entries.title: metadata manifest parse failed
entries.description: The metadata manifest did not deserialize.

entries.title: metadata manifest validation failed
entries.description: The manifest failed semantic validation.

entries.title: metadata manifest version unsupported
entries.description: The manifest `schema_version` is not supported.

entries.title: ogc collection not found
entries.description: The collection is not registered, spatially exposed, or visible to the caller.

entries.title: ogc feature not found
entries.description: The feature is not registered, visible, or within the required filter context.

entries.title: ogc record not found
entries.description: The record is not registered or visible to the caller.

entries.title: ogc api edr feature disabled
entries.description: OGC API EDR config was set but the binary lacks the feature.

entries.title: ogc api features feature disabled
entries.description: OGC API Features config was set but the binary lacks the feature.

entries.title: ogc api records feature disabled
entries.description: OGC API Records config was set but the binary lacks the feature.

entries.title: assurance insufficient
entries.description: The request assurance is insufficient for policy.

entries.title: consent required
entries.description: The policy requires a consent reference the request did not carry.

entries.title: evidence stale
entries.description: The source evidence is too old for policy.

entries.title: jurisdiction not permitted
entries.description: The request jurisdiction is not permitted by policy.

entries.title: legal basis required
entries.description: The policy requires a legal basis the request did not carry.

entries.title: policy hash invalid
entries.description: The policy hash did not validate.

entries.title: policy id required
entries.description: The policy identity is required but absent.

entries.title: policy required
entries.description: An enforceable policy constraint is required but absent.

entries.title: purpose not permitted
entries.description: The request purpose is not permitted by policy.

entries.title: unsupported policy term
entries.description: The policy contains a term the service cannot enforce.

entries.title: provenance signing algorithm unsupported
entries.description: `signing_algorithm` is not EdDSA or ES256.

entries.title: provenance claim validity out of range
entries.description: Claim validity is below 1 minute or above 365 days.

entries.title: provenance context base url invalid
entries.description: `context_base_url` is not a valid http or https URL.

entries.title: provenance issuer did mismatch
entries.description: The configured issuer DID does not match the deployment host.

entries.title: provenance jwk_env missing
entries.description: The configured signing key material is unavailable.

entries.title: provenance issuer missing
entries.description: Provenance is enabled but no issuer block resolved.

entries.title: provenance schema base url invalid
entries.description: `schema_base_url` is not a valid http or https URL.

entries.title: provenance signer kind invalid
entries.description: The signer kind is not `software` or `file_watch`.

entries.title: provenance verification method mismatch
entries.description: `verification_method_id` does not start with the issuer DID plus a fragment.

entries.title: provenance did document unavailable
entries.description: The deployment does not host a `did:web` document.

entries.title: provenance issuance failed
entries.description: The request could not be served as a verifiable credential.

entries.title: provenance signer unavailable
entries.description: The configured signing backend is not currently available.

entries.title: provenance unknown claim type or version
entries.description: No resource is registered for the requested claim type or version.

entries.title: publicschema cel feature disabled
entries.description: PublicSchema CEL mapping was configured but the binary lacks the feature.

entries.title: query cursor invalid
entries.description: The cursor is malformed, expired, or bound to a different query context.

entries.title: runtime dataset missing from metadata
entries.description: A runtime dataset id is absent from the metadata manifest.

entries.title: runtime ecosystem binding is invalid
entries.description: The ecosystem binding does not reference a governed-evidence binding with policy identity and ODRL enforcement.

entries.title: runtime ecosystem binding missing from metadata
entries.description: The configured ecosystem binding selector is absent from the metadata manifest.

entries.title: runtime entity missing from metadata
entries.description: A runtime entity name is absent from the metadata manifest.

entries.title: runtime field missing from metadata
entries.description: A runtime field binding is absent from the metadata manifest.

entries.title: runtime filter missing from metadata
entries.description: A runtime filter binding is absent from the metadata manifest.

entries.title: runtime relationship missing from metadata
entries.description: A runtime relationship binding is absent from the metadata manifest.

entries.title: runtime scope missing or invalid
entries.description: A runtime scope is missing or uses an unsupported shape.

entries.title: runtime table missing
entries.description: A runtime entity references a table that is not configured.

entries.title: runtime evidence offering kind is unsupported
entries.description: An evidence offering is not an external Registry Notary offering.

entries.title: resource unavailable
entries.description: The resource is configured but failed ingest or is mid-reload.

entries.title: unknown aggregate
entries.description: The aggregate id is not declared for the resource.

entries.title: unknown dataset
entries.description: The dataset id is not registered.

entries.title: unknown resource
entries.description: The resource id is not registered under the dataset.

entries.title: spatial bbox invalid
entries.description: The bbox parameter is malformed, uses an unsupported shape, or crosses the antimeridian.

entries.title: spatial crs unsupported
entries.description: The requested coordinate reference system is not supported.

entries.title: spatial filter unsupported
entries.description: A supported parameter cannot be evaluated for the collection.

entries.title: spatial geometry invalid
entries.description: The geometry field is malformed.

entries.title: spatial geometry too large
entries.description: The geometry exceeds the configured vertex limit.

entries.title: spdci api standards feature disabled
entries.description: SP DCI standards adapters were configured but the binary lacks the feature.

entries.title: spdci cel mapping feature disabled
entries.description: SP DCI response mapping was configured but the binary lacks the feature.

entries.title: spdci response mapper unavailable
entries.description: Response mapping is configured but the mapper extension is not installed.

entries.title: invalid spdci header
entries.description: The request header is missing or omits a required SP DCI field.

entries.title: invalid spdci message
entries.description: The request message is missing or not an object.

entries.title: missing transaction_id
entries.description: `message.transaction_id` is absent or empty.
